summary: Pair re-enablement verification tests - All 4 pairs (XAUUSD, XAUEUR, GBPJPY, AUDUSD) confirmed enabled and active in system config. 31 out of 32 backend tests passed.

minor.issue: Stripe checkout session creation fails with 'Not a valid URL' error - pre-existing issue with Stripe test mode configuration

quarantined_tests: test_create_checkout_session_valid_package - Stripe test mode URL validation issue (pre-existing)
action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix Stripe checkout URL configuration - origin_url from FRONTEND_URL/EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL may not be a valid URL for Stripe success/cancel redirects

system_config_endpoint.details: Returns active_pairs_list, disabled_pairs, tp_sl config, and outcome_tracker status

admin_authentication.details: Admin login returns correct role, system-config endpoint requires admin auth

signal_generation.details: Signal generate endpoint accessible, signals list endpoint working

health_check.details: Returns healthy status, database healthy, signal_tracker running

btcusd_disabled.details: BTCUSD confirmed in disabled_pairs (poor performance - 17.5% win rate)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All pair re-enablement tests pass. Stripe checkout has pre-existing URL validation issue but is not related to this feature. Frontend is Expo (React Native mobile app), so no Playwright E2E tests created.
